hero.title: Post-Sale Service with Defined Accountability.
hero.description:
PEIC coordinates the lifecycle service relationship for all systems it supplies: manufactured or distributed.
AMC/CMC contracts, domestic spares, site diagnosis, refurbishment, and technical response are all handled through one team.

process_heading.label: How Service Works
process_heading.title: From logged request to resolved issue.

offerings_heading.label: PEIC Service Advantages
offerings_heading.title: Support coverage built to reduce downtime.

process.title: Log the Request
process.description: By phone, email, or service ticket through PEIC's support channels. We respond immediately on phone (our priority support line, listed on the website) and email/tickets in 1 business day.

process.title: Triage & Dispatch Planning
process.description: Prompt diagnosis and dispatch planning based on equipment criticality, location, and parts availability.

process.title: On-Site Technical Response
process.description: PEIC engineers or partner engineers coordinated pan-India based on location and equipment type. If needed we bring in manufacturing engineering team as well.

process.title: Resolution & Service Record
process.description: Service report with findings, actions taken, parts used, and recommended next steps. Immediate action taken by our service engineers wherever possible.

offerings.title: AMC / CMC Contract Tiers
offerings.description: Structured annual and comprehensive maintenance contracts covering preventive maintenance, callout response, parts replacement, and calibration where applicable.

offerings.title: Spare Parts Inventory
offerings.description: Critical components stocked locally for PEIC-manufactured systems, with authorised sourcing channels and stocked inventory for supported partner-brand spares.

offerings.title: Response, Diagnosis & Solution Outline
offerings.description: Each request is triaged for criticality and geography before dispatch planning, then followed with a documented solution path.

offerings.title: Equipment Refurbishing & Upgrades
offerings.description: Lifecycle extension for suitable ageing equipment, including mechanical overhaul, control upgrades, refurbishing/refinishing, testing, and re-commissioning.

custom_cta.label: Service Planning
custom_cta.title: Planning service coverage for a healthcare facility?
custom_cta.description: PEIC can structure coordinated AMC/CMC support for manufactured and supported partner-brand equipment under one service relationship.

urgent_cta.label: Priority Support
urgent_cta.title: Equipment down?
urgent_cta.description: Call our technical priority support line directly for urgent resolution. You can also raise a service ticket for non-urgent matters.
